jsonLd.title: Flipkart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
